headline: XCF Global, Inc. Announces Receipt of $10 Million Plant Conversion Funding in Support of Pending Business Combination
summary: HOUSTON, TX / ACCESS Newswire / April 17, 2026 / XCF Global, Inc. (Nasdaq:SAFX) ("XCF"), an emerging player in decarbonizing the aviation industry through sustainable aviation fuel ("SAF"), together with DevvStream Corp. (Nasdaq:DEVS) ("DevvStream") ...
